contexts.context: ....  But over drink and food the party soon <mark>cheered</mark> up, and Mary sighed:  "What heaven it is...
...local grocer's."      "Quite right, Madam, "said the <mark>cheerful</mark> voice.  "But that has been the Herr Professor's...
...the night there.  I was glum, and he <mark>cheered</mark> me up, saying that I'd heard it all before,...
